violations.description: General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Fix broken handle and torn door seal on 1 door line frrezer.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fan covers in walk in cooler. -Clean swamp cooler.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floor edges in kitchen.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Repair chips in flooring.
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop sitting in dirty mop water in bucket.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges in kitchen need cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not maintained in good repair. -Some broken tiles in kitchen area need replaced.
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
